mythic_signature.description: A single strike hits the opponent's top three toughs in one resolution. Each hit uses the defender's individual R for damage calc.
mythic_signature.balance_note: CHAIN_THREE is the raw-power payoff, so we bring P down to 9 (from a draft 10) to avoid double-loading. Each hit still has to clear individual R — a stack of high-R toughs will absorb the chain without kills. Use Warlord when you know the opponent is lightly defended.
